positive: A whimsical, retro-futuristic astronaut floating in deep space, surrounded by nebulas and stylized constellations. The astronaut should have clean, bold silhouettes and wear a vintage, slightly whimsical bubble helmet. The composition is central and balanced, featuring strong primary colors (deep sapphire blue, bright orange, neon magenta) against a velvety dark background. Style is highly detailed graphic vector art mixed with airbrush gradients, giving it a pop-art, psychedelic poster feel. Overhead, there are stylized geometric planets and rings that frame the main subject. Composition must be suitable for repeating pattern or central placement on clothing. Cinematic lighting, clean lines, high contrast, minimal clutter.
negative: blur, low quality, amateur, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, ugly, bad anatomy, artifact, extra limbs, noise, grain, bokeh, cropped, out of frame
